statement.informal: `parametric_es` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (abs(mean_return) <= 1.0 ∧ stdev_return >= SIGMA_MIN ∧ stdev_return <= SIGMA_MAX ∧ horizon_days >= 1.0 ∧ horizon_days <= HORIZON_MAX ∧ z_alpha >= 0.0 ∧ z_alpha <= 5.0 ∧ phi_at_z >= 0.0 ∧ phi_at_z <= PHI_MAX ∧ alpha >= ALPHA_MIN ∧ alpha <= ALPHA_MAX), the function's result satisfies (True). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
